episodes.title: Escaping the Children of God Cult ft. Daniella Mestyanek Young | Khloé In Wonder Land
episodes.description:
Khloé sits down with Daniella Mestyanek Young, a cult survivor who was born and raised in the infamous Children of God. Daniella shares what it was like growing up in a highly controlled environment, how she realized something wasn’t right at a young age, and the moment she risked everything to leave at 15. From culture shock and rebuilding her identity to navigating relationships, trauma, and ultimately finding healing, this is a powerful conversation about resilience, survival, and what it really takes to start over.

ABOUT KHLOE IN WONDER LAND:
Join Khloé Kardashian each week for intimate conversations with the people who inspire her the most. Each episode dives deep into relatable and thought-provoking topics, offering a mix of humor, insight, and real-life stories. Whether it’s about navigating life’s challenges, celebrating triumphs, or finding humor in the everyday, this series delivers the kind of real talk that stays with you long after you’ve listened.
